items.title: automatisation
items.excerpt:
Bonjour, 
Il serait bien de pouvoir créer des automatisations depuis des colonnes miroirs. Cela permettrait de pouvoir faciliter au fluidifier grandement le travail avec le CRM Monday. 
Merci

items.title: Allow the creation of automations in Mirror columns
items.excerpt: Automations cannot be created out of a mirror column. It would be very useful to be able to do so, especially for notification settings depending on the mirrored items.

items.title: Bundled templates view
items.excerpt: Make it easier for project team members to locate bundled templates created in your account by incorporating a specific Category for your organization in the Template Center.

items.excerpt:

Just like in microsoft office programs!

items.title: Drag and Drop Files
items.excerpt: I would love the ability to drag and drop files from one column to another!

items.title: Rounding for Formula
items.excerpt: Would be useful to have formula column with ability to round to certain decimal place, or whole number. Use often for things like cost / SF, but no ability that I can find to round to two decimal places.

items.title: Add hours to time tracker without start and stop times
items.excerpt: We would really like to be able to add time to the time tracker without having to give start and stop times, as this is quite time consuming in itself. Is this something that might be considered in a future update?

items.title: Create tasks from MyWork
items.excerpt: Given I keep mywork view open pretty much all day, it would be much more convenient and efficient if items / tasks could be created from the mywork view. During creation they could be assigned to a board.
